features.title: Everything Your Trading Business Needs
features.description: Purpose-built for Saudi trading companies. From e-invoicing to multi-warehouse inventory, every feature is designed to simplify your operations.
features.title_why: Why Fateh ERP Works for Your Business
features.desc_why: Scale efficiently, customize your plan, and benefit from transparent costs. Elevate your trading operations with continuous support and cutting-edge updates.

scale.title: Scale Efficiently
scale.desc: Start with the Starter plan and grow into Professional or Enterprise as your trading volume increases. Your data migrates seamlessly — no re-implementation needed.

tailored.title: Tailored for Trading
tailored.desc: Unlike generic ERPs, every module in Fateh is optimized for trading workflows — from goods procurement to multi-store sales and ZATCA-compliant invoicing.

costs.title: Transparent Costs
costs.desc: No hidden fees, no surprise charges. Our per-user pricing is straightforward, and you can upgrade or downgrade at any time without penalties.

support.title: Continuous Support
support.desc: Our Saudi-based support team understands your business. From onboarding to ongoing optimization, we are with you every step of the way.

zatca.title: ZATCA E-Invoicing
zatca.desc: Fully compliant with ZATCA Phase 2 requirements. Generate, validate, and submit e-invoices automatically — no manual configuration needed.

sales.title: Sales & POS
sales.desc: Manage quotations, sales orders, and invoices seamlessly. Built-in POS for retail operations with real-time inventory sync.

inventory.title: Inventory Management
inventory.desc: Track stock across multiple warehouses in real time. Automated reorder points, batch tracking, and comprehensive stocktaking tools.

accounting.title: Financial Accounting
accounting.desc: Complete double-entry accounting with VAT management. Automated journal entries, bank reconciliation, and financial reporting.

crm.title: CRM & Customer Management
crm.desc: Track leads, manage customer relationships, and run loyalty programs. Integrated communication history for every client.

procurement.title: Procurement & Purchasing
procurement.desc: Streamline supplier management, purchase orders, and requisitions. Compare quotes and track deliveries from a single dashboard.

security.title: Data Security & Compliance
security.desc: Enterprise-grade security with role-based access control, audit trails, and full compliance with Saudi data protection regulations.

implementation.title: Fast Implementation
implementation.desc: Go live in 2-4 weeks with our guided onboarding. Dedicated implementation team handles data migration and user training.

modules.title: Complete Trading Management
modules.description: Six integrated modules that cover every aspect of your trading operations — from sales to finance.

sales.label: Sales & Invoicing
sales.title: Sell Smarter, Invoice Faster
sales.desc: Create quotations, convert to sales orders, and generate ZATCA-compliant e-invoices in seconds. Manage pricing lists, discounts, and customer-specific terms with full automation.

inventory.label: Inventory
inventory.title: Real-Time Stock Visibility
inventory.desc: Track every item across multiple warehouses with real-time updates. Automated reorder points ensure you never run out of stock, while batch and serial number tracking provides full traceability.

procurement.label: Procurement
procurement.title: Streamlined Purchasing
procurement.desc: Manage your entire purchase cycle from requisition to delivery. Compare supplier quotes, track purchase orders, and maintain a centralized supplier database for better negotiation.

finance.label: Finance
finance.title: Complete Financial Control
finance.desc: Double-entry accounting with automated journal entries, bank reconciliation, and comprehensive financial reporting. Built-in VAT management ensures compliance with Saudi tax regulations.

crm.label: CRM
crm.title: Build Lasting Relationships
crm.desc: Track every customer interaction from first contact to repeat purchase. Manage leads, run loyalty programs, and use data-driven insights to grow customer lifetime value.

reports.label: Reports
reports.title: Data-Driven Decisions
reports.desc: Access real-time dashboards and detailed reports across all business functions. From sales trends to inventory turnover, get the insights you need to make informed decisions.

about.title: The Perfect Solution for Saudi Traders
about.description: Fateh ERP was built from the ground up to address the specific needs of trading businesses in Saudi Arabia. We combine enterprise-grade technology with deep local expertise to deliver a platform that truly works for you.

approach.title: Trading-First Approach
approach.desc: Every feature is designed with traders in mind. We understand the unique challenges of buying, selling, and managing goods in the Saudi market.

scaling.title: Smart Scaling
scaling.desc: Start with what you need and grow at your own pace. Our modular architecture means you only pay for the capabilities your business requires.

expertise.title: Local Expertise
expertise.desc: Our team speaks your language, understands Saudi regulations, and provides support during your business hours. We are your technology partner.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Trading Business?
cta.description: Join 200+ Saudi businesses using Fateh ERP. Book a free demo or start your trial today — our team is here to help you every step of the way.

form.title: Schedule a Free Demo
form.desc: Fill in your details and our team will reach out within 24 hours.
form.name: Full Name
form.message_placeholder: Tell us about your trading business and what you need...
form.footer: Free 14-day trial included. No credit card required.
form.success: Thank you! Our team will contact you within 24 hours.
form.error: Failed to send request. Please try again.

footer.description: Saudi Arabia's leading ERP solution for trading businesses. ZATCA compliant, cloud-based, and built for growth.

hero.title: The Trading ERP
hero.description: Manage sales, inventory, procurement, and finance in one powerful platform. Purpose-built for trading companies in the Kingdom.

dialog.trial_desc: Enter your details below and our team will get you set up with a free trial.
dialog.demo_desc: Enter your information and we'll contact you to schedule a personalized demo.

pricing.title: Pricing That Aligns with
pricing.description: Transparent, scalable plans designed for trading businesses of every size. Start small and grow — no hidden fees, no surprises.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Saudi Traders
testimonials.description: See how trading businesses across the Kingdom are growing with Fateh ERP.

help_banner.title: Help Is Just One Tap Away
help_banner.description: At Fateh ERP, we reach out to trading businesses at periodic intervals, offering assistance on a no-obligation basis. Book an appointment for an exploratory call with our subject matter expert.

stats.title: Trusted Across the Kingdom
stats.description: Powering trading businesses from Riyadh to Jeddah and beyond.
